title: Spicy Juicy Tunisian Lamb Tagine
description: A comforting, keto-friendly lamb tagine bursting with spices, stoned dates, and a savory broth, perfect for a cozy dinner.

ingredients.name: Spice blend
ingredients.notes: 1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp coriander, 1 tsp smoked paprika, 1 tsp harissa paste

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a heavy‑bottomed pot over medium heat and brown the lamb cubes on all sides, about 5–7 minutes.
Add the sliced onions, minced garlic, and grated ginger, sautéing until the onions soften and become translucent, about 4 minutes.
Stir in the spice blend and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in the beef broth, add the dates and bay leaf, and bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and let the tagine cook for 1.5–2 hours or until the lamb is tender and the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Discard the bay leaf.
Stir in the chopped fresh herbs just before serving, and ladle the tagine into bowls.
Serve hot with a side of cauliflower rice or a fresh salad if desired.
